methods.name: ultima_scraper_collection.managers.datascraper_manager.datascrapers.fansly.FanslyDataScraper.get_all_stories
documentation:
get_all_stories(subscription: create_user)

This function returns a list of all stories and archived stories from the given subscription.

Arguments:
subscription (create_user): An instance of the create_user class.

Returns:
list[create_story]: A list containing all stories and archived stories from the subscription.

methods.name: ultima_scraper_collection.managers.datascraper_manager.datascrapers.fansly.FanslyDataScraper.get_all_subscriptions
documentation:
get_all_subscriptions(authed: AuthModel, identifiers: list[int | str] = [], refresh: bool = True)

This function returns a list of all subscriptions, including both subscriptions and followings,
from the given authenticated user.

Arguments:
authed (AuthModel): An instance of the AuthModel class.
identifiers (list[int | str], optional): A list of identifiers (username or id) for the subscriptions. Defaults to an empty list.
refresh (bool, optional): A flag indicating whether to refresh the list of subscriptions. Defaults to True.

Returns:
list[create_subscription]: A list of all subscriptions, including both subscriptions and followings, from the authenticated user.

methods.name: ultima_scraper_collection.managers.datascraper_manager.datascrapers.onlyfans.OnlyFansDataScraper.get_all_stories
documentation:
get_all_stories(subscription: create_user)

This function returns a list of all stories and highlights from the given subscription.

Arguments:
subscription (create_user): An instance of the create_user class.

Returns:
list[create_highlight | create_story]: A list containing all stories and highlights from the subscription.

methods.name: ultima_scraper_collection.managers.datascraper_manager.datascrapers.onlyfans.OnlyFansDataScraper.get_all_subscriptions
documentation:
get_all_subscriptions(authed: AuthModel, identifiers: list[int | str] = [], refresh: bool = True)

This function returns a list of all subscriptions from the given authenticated user.

Arguments:
authed (AuthModel): An instance of the AuthModel class.
identifiers (list[int | str], optional): A list of identifiers (username or id) for the subscriptions. Defaults to an empty list.
refresh (bool, optional): A flag indicating whether to refresh the list of subscriptions. Defaults to True.

Returns:
list[create_subscription]: A list of all subscriptions, sorted by expiredAt, from the authenticated user.

methods.name: ultima_scraper_collection.modules.module_streamliner.StreamlinedDatascraper.scrape_vault
documentation: Prepares the API links to be scraped

functions.name: ultima_scraper_collection.managers.database_manager.connections.sqlite.legacy_databases.stories.migration.alembic.env.run_migrations_offline
documentation:
Run migrations in 'offline' mode.

This configures the context with just a URL
and not an Engine, though an Engine is acceptable
here as well.  By skipping the Engine creation
we don't even need a DBAPI to be available.

Calls to context.execute() here emit the given string to the
script output.
other values from the config, defined by the needs of env.py,

functions.name: ultima_scraper_collection.managers.database_manager.connections.sqlite.legacy_databases.stories.migration.alembic.env.run_migrations_online
documentation:
Run migrations in 'online' mode.

In this scenario we need to create an Engine
and associate a connection with the context.

functions.name: ultima_scraper_collection.helpers.main_helper.is_valuable
documentation:
Checks if the user is valuable based on their subscription status or if they have supplied content to a buyer.

Args:
    user (DBUserModel | user_types): The user to check.

Returns:
    bool: True if the user is valuable, False otherwise.

methods.name: ultima_scraper_collection.managers.filesystem_manager.FormatTypes.check_rules
documentation:
Checks for invalid filepath

Returns:
    tuple(str,bool): Returns a string which explains invalid filepath format
